top_signals.title: Big egg producers settle price inflation probe with DOJ for 53 million eggs — and $3.3M
top_signals.summary: Cal-Maine Foods, Versova and Hickman's Egg Ranch agreed to settle allegations of price manipulation by the Department of Justice and 17 states.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Blackline Safety Announces Closing of Going Private Transaction with Francisco Partners
top_signals.summary: Blackline Safety Corp. (“Blackline” or the “Company“) (TSX: BLN) a global leader in connected safety technology, is pleased to announce the completion of the previously announced plan of arrangement (the “Arrangement“) pursuant to which Apollo Purchaser, Inc. (the “Purchaser“) an affiliate of Francisco Partners Management, L.P. (“FP“), acquired all the issued and outstanding common shares [...]
